name: Jason Mraz
abstract: Jason Thomas Mraz ( mə-RAZ; born June 23, 1977) is an American singer-songwriter and guitarist. He rose to prominence with the release of his debut studio album, Waiting for My Rocket to Come (2002), which spawned the single "The Remedy (I Won't Worry)" that peaked at number 15 on the Billboard Hot 100 chart.

about_quotes.speaker: Reggie Watkins
about_quotes.evidence: After Maynard died, two years after that I got the call to go with Jason Mraz, and that was something I couldn’t turn down. And that lasted a long time.
about_quotes.doc_title: Reggie Watkins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 22, 2018
